summary: Iteration 183: Landing Page Redesign (Pack 2) + Footer Enhancement + Content Pages (Pack 3) - All 16 features tested and passing. Landing page has all 7 sections (Hero, How It Works, Trust Signals, Featured Categories, Testimonials, Payment Trust Block, CTA). Footer has 5 columns with Company links. Content pages (/privacy, /terms, /help, /about) all render correctly.
test_credentials: No login required for public pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page redesign and content pages fully tested. Key findings: (1) Hero section has correct headline 'Order Business Supplies, Printing & Services — Fast, Verified, and Fully Managed', (2) Hero CTAs link to /marketplace and /request-quote correctly, (3) How It Works shows 4 steps: Browse or Request, Place Order & Pay, We Verify & Assign, Delivery & Tracking, (4) Trust Signals shows 3 cards: Verified Vendors, Payment Verification, Dedicated Support, (5) Featured Categories shows 4 cards linking to proper routes, (6) Testimonials shows 3 quotes, (7) Payment Trust Block displays 'Your Payment Is Verified First', (8) CTA section shows 'Ready to Place Your Order?' with both buttons, (9) Footer has 5 columns: Brand, Marketplace, Company, Business, Contact, (10) Company column has About Konekt, Help Center, Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, Contact Us links, (11) Footer bottom bar has Privacy and Terms links, (12) /privacy renders Privacy Policy page, (13) /terms renders Terms of Service page, (14) /help renders Help Center with FAQ accordion sections (Ordering, Payment, Delivery, Account), (15) /about renders About page, (16) All footer links navigate correctly. NOTE: Frontend restart was required to see latest footer changes.

landing_page.hero_section: PASS - Headline contains 'Order Business Supplies, Printing & Services'
landing_page.payment_trust_block: PASS - Displays 'Your Payment Is Verified First'
